queries.title: Actors or groups
queries.description: Threat actor, ransomware group, malware, or campaign names to monitor. Leave empty to use the 100-name high-signal default watchlist. Custom runs accept up to 100 names.

query.title: Single actor or group
query.description: Optional single query. Used when queries is empty.

maxRowsPerQuery.title: Max rows per query
maxRowsPerQuery.description: Maximum normalized dataset rows returned per query.

includeActivity.title: Include recent activity
includeActivity.description: Return rows for recent public mentions, claims, and reporting when available.

includeTargets.title: Include targeting
includeTargets.description: Return rows for likely sectors, countries, or regions associated with the query.

includeTtps.title: Include TTPs
includeTtps.description: Return rows for observed techniques, tactics, tools, and mapped ATT&CK identifiers when available.

includeSources.title: Include source coverage
includeSources.description: Return source provenance rows used to support the result.

includeDatasets.title: Include dataset coverage
includeDatasets.description: Add service coverage rows. Leave disabled when you only need actor intelligence and evidence.

includeCoverageGaps.title: Include coverage gaps
includeCoverageGaps.description: Add rows that explain thin, stale, or missing public coverage and the recommended source action. Disabled by default so normal runs stay focused on buyer-useful intelligence rows.

includeHeldRows.title: Include held diagnostics
includeHeldRows.description: Add held or suppressed rows for quality review. Disabled by default because these rows are not buyer-payworthy dataset items.
